#launch-project-chat
and need to book a meeting. Would you like me to find a good time?
yes!
You're all available during these times:
Monday at 3:00 PM
Tuesday at 1:00 PM
book it for monday

Docs
8

Sarah Kim
Design Review moved to Thursday
Hey team, quick heads-up — we're pushing the design review to Thursday at 2pm.
James Patel
Feedback on your client presentation
Great work on the slides. I added a couple of notes around clarity and flow.
Laura Chen
Coffee next week?
It's been a while since we caught up — are you free for a quick coffee next week?
HR Team
Reminder: Open enrollment closes Friday
Don't forget to update your benefits selections before the deadline this week.
Mike Torres
Sprint planning agenda attached
Please review the agenda ahead of Monday’s sprint planning meeting.
Schedule 15 minutes for a quick meeting with Mike
Tailor this language for executives
Team workspace
Share
Streamlining Team Documentation
I've been thinking about how our team can streamline the onboarding process for
new-hires
.
Right now, documentation is scattered across different tools, which makes it hard to find answers quickly. If we consolidate into a single hub and add
more real-world examples, I think it'll cut down on
repetative
questions and help people ramp up faster.
Proofread with Grammarly
Schedule 15 minutes for a quick meeting with Mike

Mail
The most productive email app ever made
Fly through your inbox twice as fast as before, never drop the ball again, and save 4 hours every single week.

Follow up on time, every time
Write with AI that sounds like you

Everyone’s favorite AI writing partner

Works everywhere you write
Find the right words instantly
Write with AI that adapts to your tone and voice
Let your brilliance shine

Coda
The all-in-one AI workspace for teams
Build everything from wikis, through project plans, to goal trackers — keeping everyone perfectly in sync.
Learn more about Coda
Connect Slack, Jira, Salesforce, and 800+ tools
Build your team wiki, project plans, and company goal trackers
Create a single source of truth for all your team’s knowledge
Save time on manual tasks with Coda AI

Go
AI that actually works in every app you use
Go is the proactive AI assistant that knows what you know and offers help without you having to ask.
Learn more about Go
Connect Gmail, Drive, Jira, and all of your favorite apps
Say the right thing with the right info, everywhere you write
Schedule meetings without leaving the conversation
Work with any app, from any app

Becoming Superhuman.
When AI works everywhere you work, it starts to change
how
you work. At first, you think faster and more deeply. Before you know it, you have the time to be more creative, strategic, and impactful—free to do what only you can do.

It's the speed, thoughtfulness, and quality that for me, make it a no-brainer for any high-performing team.
Jen Igartua
CEO, Go Nimbly
My co-founder and I run a startup studio, and constant communication is incredibly important. Superhuman Mail is one of the first tools that immediately changed my habits: increasing my responsiveness, while decreasing the time I spend on email.
Jeff Morris Jr.
Managing Partner, Chapter One
Superhuman Mail brings order back to email and makes it useful again. My team doesn't miss emails anymore, and they're actually able to focus on the things that matter.
Ben Terrill
Sr. Director of Customer Success, Brex

docs.title: Superhuman
docs.text:
Superhuman
Help Center
Looking for help?
Guides
Short guides to help you work faster, smarter, and get the most out of Superhuman.
Webinars
Join a live webinar to learn tips, shortcuts, and advanced workflows from Superhuman experts.
Top Questions
Common questions and solutions.
Account Setup
How to download our apps, manage your inbox, and add your email accounts.
Billing
Manage your subscription, create a team subscription, or update your payment method.
Troubleshooting
Fix common issues and get back to blazing through your inbox.
Features
Overviews of our most powerful and popular features.
Integrations
Other tools and apps that work within Superhuman.
Use Cases
Learn how Superhuman can empower YOU.
Need more help with Superhuman Mail? Reach out to
hello@superhuman.com
.
Discovered a vulnerability or anything that could put our users at risk? Reach out to
security@superhuman.com
.

hits.title: 'Underwater bicycle' propels swimmers forward at superhuman speed
Superhuman embeds tracking pixels in user emails
Superhuman: What can AI do in 30 minutes?
Adversarial policies beat superhuman Go AIs (2023)
The Myth of a Superhuman AI
Superhuman is what Gmail would be if built today
Grammarly rebrands to 'Superhuman,' launches a new AI assistant

analysis.name: Superhuman
analysis.value_proposition: A unified AI suite of email, writing, workspace, and ambient assistant tools that helps high-performing teams fly through work twice as fast and save 4 hours every week.
analysis.ideal_customer: High-performing professionals and teams at innovative companies who need maximum email throughput, AI writing assistance, CRM connectivity, and enterprise security controls

features.name: write with ai
features.description: AI-assisted email composition that sounds like the user

features.name: instant reply
features.description: AI-generated one-click reply suggestions for fast email triage

features.name: instant event
features.description: Create calendar events directly from email content with one click

features.name: auto archive
features.description: AI automatically archives emails that don't need a response

features.name: auto labels
features.description: AI automatically categorizes and labels incoming emails

features.name: auto reminders
features.description: AI automatically sets follow-up reminders on emails

features.name: auto summarize
features.description: AI-generated summaries of long email threads

features.name: autocorrect
features.description: Automatic spelling and grammar correction while composing

features.name: autocomplete
features.description: AI-powered sentence completion suggestions while composing

features.name: auto label library
features.description: Pre-built library of AI label templates to start from

features.name: custom auto labels
features.description: User-defined automatic labeling rules for inbox organization

features.name: personalization
features.description: AI personalization that adapts to user's writing style and preferences

features.name: custom auto labels with ai
features.description: AI-generated custom label rules; more advanced than manual custom labels

features.name: auto drafts
features.description: AI automatically drafts full email replies for the user to review and send

features.name: ask ai
features.description: Conversational AI assistant for email-related queries and tasks

features.name: voice and tone match
features.description: AI matches the user's personal voice and tone across all AI-written content

features.name: knowledge base
features.description: AI knowledge base built from email history to inform AI responses

features.name: superhuman mail mcp
features.description: Model Context Protocol integration exposing Superhuman Mail to external AI tools

features.name: split inbox
features.description: Divides inbox into multiple focused priority sections

features.name: split inbox library
features.description: Pre-built templates for common split inbox configurations

features.name: snippets
features.description: Reusable text templates for common email replies and phrases

features.name: remind me
features.description: Resurface emails at a later time as a reminder

features.name: snooze
features.description: Temporarily hide emails to resurface at a chosen future time

features.name: unsubscribe
features.description: One-click unsubscribe from mailing lists and newsletters

features.name: block
features.description: Block senders from delivering future messages

features.name: read statuses
features.description: See when recipients have opened your sent emails

features.name: quick quote
features.description: Quickly inline-quote specific parts of an email when replying

features.name: instant intro
features.description: Quickly introduce two contacts to each other via email

features.name: send later
features.description: Schedule emails to be delivered at a specified future time

features.name: undo send
features.description: Cancel a sent email within a configurable short window

features.name: offline support
features.description: Access, read, and compose emails without an internet connection

features.name: instant copy
features.description: Keyboard-driven instant copy of email content

features.name: instant open
features.description: Keyboard shortcut to instantly open emails without mouse

features.name: instant send
features.description: Keyboard-driven instant email sending

features.name: share availability
features.description: Share calendar availability links inline when composing email

features.name: zoom integration
features.description: Create and attach Zoom meeting links from within email

features.name: google meet integration
features.description: Create and attach Google Meet links from within email

features.name: microsoft teams integration
features.description: Create and attach Microsoft Teams meeting links from within email

features.name: see your day
features.description: Daily calendar overview visible inline within the email interface

features.name: see your week
features.description: Weekly calendar overview visible inline within the email interface

features.name: create event
features.description: Create calendar events without leaving the email interface

features.name: shared conversations
features.description: Share email threads with teammates for internal collaboration

features.name: team comments
features.description: Add internal-only comments on email threads visible only to teammates

features.name: shared drafts
features.description: Collaborate on email drafts with teammates before sending

features.name: team snippets
features.description: Shared reusable text templates available to the whole team

features.name: team read statuses
features.description: See which teammates have read a shared email thread

features.name: team reply indicators
features.description: See when a teammate is composing a reply to prevent duplicate responses

features.name: team scheduling
features.description: Coordinate meeting scheduling across multiple team members

features.name: ai team knowledge
features.description: AI trained on the team's shared email context and knowledge

features.name: smart send
features.description: AI-optimized send timing based on recipient behavior patterns

features.name: recent opens
features.description: Surface recent email open activity for sales follow-up prioritization

features.name: hubspot integration
features.description: Sync email activity and contacts with HubSpot CRM

features.name: salesforce integration
features.description: Sync email activity and contacts with Salesforce CRM

features.name: pipedrive integration
features.description: Sync email activity and contacts with Pipedrive CRM

features.name: centralized billing
features.description: Unified billing management across all team members

features.name: team management
features.description: Add, remove, and manage team member seats and access

features.name: team management controls
features.description: Advanced admin controls over team settings and permissions

features.name: snippet manager
features.description: Centralized admin tool to manage and govern team-wide snippets

features.name: soc ii type ii
features.description: SOC II Type II security compliance certification

features.name: sso
features.description: Single Sign-On authentication support for enterprise identity providers

features.name: user provisioning (scim)
features.description: Automated user provisioning and deprovisioning via SCIM protocol

features.name: custom compliance
features.description: Custom compliance configurations for regulated industries

features.name: google advanced protection
features.description: Support for Google Advanced Protection Program for high-risk accounts

features.name: advanced admin controls
features.description: Enterprise-level administrative policy enforcement controls

features.name: external recipient indicators
features.description: Visual warnings when composing email to recipients outside the organization

features.name: bring your own key (byok)
features.description: Customer-managed encryption keys for data at rest

features.name: phishing reporting
features.description: One-click phishing email reporting forwarding to security team

features.name: audit logs
features.description: Detailed audit trail of user and admin actions for compliance

features.name: productivity coaching
features.description: Live coaching sessions to maximize user productivity with the product

features.name: proactive ai assistant (go)
features.description: Ambient AI assistant that proactively surfaces help across all apps without prompting
features.evidence_quote: Go is the proactive AI assistant that knows what you know and offers help without you having to ask.

features.name: cross-app ai context
features.description: AI pulls context from Gmail, Drive, Jira, and other connected apps to inform suggestions
features.evidence_quote: Connect Gmail, Drive, Jira, and all of your favorite apps

features.name: ai meeting scheduling in-context
features.description: Schedule meetings without leaving the current app or conversation
features.evidence_quote: Schedule meetings without leaving the conversation

features.name: ai writing assistant (grammarly)
features.description: Full Grammarly AI writing tool integrated into the Superhuman suite
features.evidence_quote: Turn your thoughts into writing that's clear, credible, and impossible to ignore.

features.name: team wiki (coda)
features.description: Build and maintain team wikis and knowledge bases via Coda
features.evidence_quote: Build your team wiki, project plans, and company goal trackers

features.name: project plans (coda)
features.description: Create and collaborate on project plans inside Coda
features.evidence_quote: Build everything from wikis, through project plans, to goal trackers

features.name: coda ai automation
features.description: AI-powered automation to eliminate manual tasks in Coda workspace
features.evidence_quote: Save time on manual tasks with Coda AI

features.name: 800+ app integrations (coda)
features.description: Coda connects to Slack, Jira, Salesforce, and 800+ third-party tools
features.evidence_quote: Connect Slack, Jira, Salesforce, and 800+ tools

features.name: agent store
features.description: Marketplace of pre-built AI agents for specialized tasks

features.name: email open tracking pixels
features.description: Embedded tracking pixels that notify sender when recipient opens an email
features.evidence_quote: Superhuman embeds tracking pixels in user emails

features.name: team analytics
features.description: Analytics dashboard showing team email performance and productivity metrics

differentiators: Fly through your inbox twice as fast as before
The most productive email app ever made
AI that actually works in every app you use — proactive, not reactive (Go)
Suite approach combining email + AI writing (Grammarly) + workspace (Coda) + ambient AI (Go)
Voice and tone matching so AI-written email sounds like the user
Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration for Superhuman Mail
Keyboard-first design philosophy for speed (Instant Send, Instant Open, Instant Copy)

recent_ships.what: Grammarly acquires Superhuman and later rebrands entire company to 'Superhuman', expanding from email-only to full suite
recent_ships.source: Grammarly acquires Superhuman / Grammarly rebrands to 'Superhuman,' launches a new AI assistant

recent_ships.what: Superhuman Go launched — proactive ambient AI assistant that works across all apps
recent_ships.source: Go is the proactive AI assistant that knows what you know and offers help without you having to ask.

recent_ships.what: Agent Store launched — marketplace of pre-built AI agents
recent_ships.source: Agent Store (listed as product on landing page)

recent_ships.what: Superhuman Mail MCP launched — Model Context Protocol integration for Business/Enterprise tiers
recent_ships.source: Superhuman Mail MCP (pricing page, Business+ feature)

recent_ships.what: Coda integrated as team workspace product into the Superhuman suite
recent_ships.source: Coda — The all-in-one AI workspace for teams (landing page suite listing)

praised: It's the speed, thoughtfulness, and quality that for me, make it a no-brainer for any high-performing team. — Jen Igartua, CEO Go Nimbly
Superhuman Mail is one of the first tools that immediately changed my habits: increasing my responsiveness, while decreasing the time I spend
Superhuman is what Gmail would be if built today (HN, 189↑)
Speed and keyboard-driven design praised as core differentiator
complaints: Superhuman embeds tracking pixels in user emails — raised privacy concerns about recipients being tracked without consent (HN, 467↑ 241c)
Premium price point relative to free email clients is a recurring friction point

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Email productivity, core Superhuman AI, team collaboration, calendar, centralized billing; $30/mo if billed monthly

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Starter plus Auto Drafts, Ask AI, MCP, Voice Match, Knowledge Base, CRM integrations, Recent Opens; $40/mo if billed monthly

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Business plus SSO, SCIM, BYOK, Audit Logs, Advanced Admin, Team Analytics, dedicated CSM, priority support

pricing.notes: No free tier. Displayed prices ($25/$33) are annual per-month equivalents; monthly billing runs ~$30/$40 respectively. Enterprise has 17% yearly discount listed but requires sales contact for pricing. All plans require annual or monthly subscription — no usage-based pricing visible.

recent_hn.title: Show HN: BAREmail – minimalist Gmail client for bad WiFi
My indie app was named too close to competitors and I burnt my fingers
Ask HN: Do you need to look at the code?
How to Beat Superhuman AIs [at Go] [video]
Show HN: Made a highly organised email client with prompt-free AI within
